name: WEAPONIZED Episode #42 — The Sol Foundation Conference and Grusch Revelations
summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp are joined by citizen journalist Joe Murgia to discuss the inaugural Sol Foundation symposium, David Grusch’s recent public comments, congressional pressure surrounding the UAP Disclosure Act, and the Syria “Dome” UAP photograph.
episodeTitle: The Sol Foundation Conference and Grusch Revelations
researchNotes: Official episode description identifies Joe Murgia as the participating guest.
Garry Nolan is discussed as a co-host of the inaugural Sol Foundation symposium; he is not represented as an episode guest.
The episode also discusses congressional resistance to the Schumer–Rounds UAP Disclosure Act and the Syria Dome UAP photograph.

relationships.context: Guest discussing the Sol Foundation symposium and recent UAP developments
Discussed as a co-host of the inaugural Sol Foundation symposium
